name: /import-eslint-config suggests an ESLint-as-detector wrap for a rule with no direct or semantic mapping
command: printf '{"rules":{"some-niche-rule":"error"}}\n' > .eslintrc && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/import-eslint-config.sh" .eslintrc --mapping-stub no-match --dry-run 2>out.txt && grep -q 'some-niche-rule: suggest-eslint-detector-wrap' out.txt && echo ok 1>&2
